name: com.ezg.csv-reader
description: Reflection-based CSV → C# / ScriptableObject deserializer and editor import pipeline for Unity. Parses CSV text into typed model arrays (including nested objects and arrays), supports ID-value sheets, and auto-imports feature-local CsvConfig CSVs into ScriptableObject collection assets via an AssetPostprocessor. A 'Ezg/CsvReader/Project setup' editor menu bootstraps the CsvReaderConfig asset and generates a GenDataManager.cs source file from a bundled template. Project-specific paths, suffixes, namespaces and shared-model prefixes are externalized to a CsvReaderConfig asset, so the package has no hardcoded dependency on any game's data layer. No third-party dependencies (Unity built-ins only).
